title: Template Selection
description: Records the selected template and its capabilities

template_id.description: Unique identifier from the templates catalog

template_repo.description: Git repository URL for the template

supported_pages.description: Pages available as pre-built layouts in this template

unsupported_pages.description: Requested pages that need custom work

supported_features.description: Features the template supports out of the box

unsupported_features.description: Requested features not supported by the template

styling_system.description: CSS framework used by the template

selected_at.description: ISO timestamp when the selection was made
